title: Shelly Leferman
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Shelly Leferman''' is a comic book letterer who worked on a few issues in the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] comic series.

{{Artist-stub}}

==Star Wars bibliography==
===Letterer===
*[[Star Wars (1977) 49|''Star Wars'' (1977) 49]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 53|''Star Wars'' (1977) 53]]
